'''fobafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vulpicidal|vulpicidal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-b-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vulpicidal|vulpicidal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fobafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fobafithi|fobafithi]] || [[word:fobafiji|fobafiji]] || [[word:fobafishi|fobafishi]] || [[word:fobafiki|fobafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fobafuthuthu|fobafuthuthu]] || [[word:fobafujuju|fobafujuju]] || [[word:fobafushushu|fobafushushu]] || [[word:fobafukuku|fobafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fobafuthu|fobafuthu]] || [[word:fobafuju|fobafuju]] || [[word:fobafushu|fobafushu]] || [[word:fobafuku|fobafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fobafufthuf|fobafufthuf]] || [[word:fobafufjuf|fobafufjuf]] || [[word:fobafufshuf|fobafufshuf]] || [[word:fobafufkuf|fobafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fobafethe|fobafethe]] || [[word:fobafeje|fobafeje]] || [[word:fobafeshe|fobafeshe]] || [[word:fobafeke|fobafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fobafothotho|fobafothotho]] || [[word:fobafojojo|fobafojojo]] || [[word:fobafoshosho|fobafoshosho]] || [[word:fobafokoko|fobafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fobafotho|fobafotho]] || [[word:fobafojo|fobafojo]] || [[word:fobafosho|fobafosho]] || [[word:fobafoko|fobafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fobafofthof|fobafofthof]] || [[word:fobafofjof|fobafofjof]] || [[word:fobafofshof|fobafofshof]] || [[word:fobafofkof|fobafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fobafÃŸfthÃŸf|fobafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fobafÃŸfjÃŸf|fobafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fobafÃŸfshÃŸf|fobafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fobafÃŸfkÃŸf|fobafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fobafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|fobafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fobafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|fobafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fobafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|fobafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fobafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|fobafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fobafÃŸfthÃŸf|fobafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fobafÃŸfjÃŸf|fobafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fobafÃŸfshÃŸf|fobafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fobafÃŸfkÃŸf|fobafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fobafÃŸfthÃŸf|fobafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fobafÃŸfjÃŸf|fobafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fobafÃŸfshÃŸf|fobafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fobafÃŸfkÃŸf|fobafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fobafÃḊthÃḊ|fobafÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:fobafÃḊjÃḊ|fobafÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:fobafÃḊshÃḊ|fobafÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:fobafÃḊkÃḊ|fobafÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fobafathatha|fobafathatha]] || [[word:fobafajaja|fobafajaja]] || [[word:fobafashasha|fobafashasha]] || [[word:fobafakaka|fobafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fobafatha|fobafatha]] || [[word:fobafaja|fobafaja]] || [[word:fobafasha|fobafasha]] || [[word:fobafaka|fobafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fobafafthaf|fobafafthaf]] || [[word:fobafafjaf|fobafafjaf]] || [[word:fobafafshaf|fobafafshaf]] || [[word:fobafafkaf|fobafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fobafasha|fobafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fobafshÃḋsha|fobafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fobafrosha|fobafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fobafmusha|fobafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fobafyasha|fobafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofobafnkshÃḋsha|gofobafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofobafnkrosha|gofobafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofobafnkmusha|gofobafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofobafnkyasha|gofobafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fobabafasha|fobabafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fobabafshÃḋsha|fobabafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fobabafrosha|fobabafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fobabafmusha|fobabafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fobabafyasha|fobabafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofobabafnkshÃḋsha|gofobabafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofobabafnkrosha|gofobabafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofobabafnkmusha|gofobabafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofobabafnkyasha|gofobabafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:febÃḊfasha|febÃḊfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:febÃḊfshÃḋsha|febÃḊfshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:febÃḊfrosha|febÃḊfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:febÃḊfmusha|febÃḊfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:febÃḊfyasha|febÃḊfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofebÃḊfnkshÃḋsha|gofebÃḊfnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofebÃḊfnkrosha|gofebÃḊfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofebÃḊfnkmusha|gofebÃḊfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofebÃḊfnkyasha|gofebÃḊfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fobfafasha|fobfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fobfafshÃḋsha|fobfafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fobfafrosha|fobfafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fobfafmusha|fobfafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fobfafyasha|fobfafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofobfafnkshÃḋsha|gofobfafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofobfafnkrosha|gofobfafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofobfafnkmusha|gofobfafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofobfafnkyasha|gofobfafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
